title: What is Claude Design?
summary: Claude Design is a feature within Claude that allows users to generate full designs including websites, UI screens, presentations, and marketing creatives from text prompts. The video discusses how this tool democratizes design creation for beginners while raising questions about AI's impact on professional designers.
